Class Manager

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.user.User
kbtu.model.user.Employee
kbtu.model.user.Manager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Manager extends Employee
Academic/administrative manager. Handles course assignments, student registration approval, and reports.
